title: SUITE_SITE_SUITE_5_1_96_SINGLE_CORE_AUTHORITY_2026-05-22.md
text:
# Site Suite 5.1.96 - Single Core Authority

Data: 2026-05-22

## Cosa chiude
- prima base reale di `Single Core Authority` tra Suite e Codex connector
- contratto template condiviso
- regola host-fit/title per `Nika haircare`

## Nuovi elementi
- `packages/shared-contracts/template_core_authority_v1.json`
- `scripts/sync_template_core_authority.js`
- copia runtime connector:
  - `packages/core-codex-connector/config/template-core-authority.json`
- copia runtime Suite:
  - `wordpress/plugins/skinharmony-site-suite/config/template-core-authority.json`

## Effetto prodotto
- stessi vincoli famiglia/template tra Suite e Codex
- `Nika` non usa piu solo hardcode locale per titolo e colonne
- il fix anti-strozzatura nasce dal contratto condiviso

## Verifiche
- `node scripts/sync_template_core_authority.js`
- `node --check packages/core-codex-connector/src/cli.mjs`
- `/opt/homebrew/bin/php -l wordpress/plugins/skinharmony-site-suite/skinharmony-site-suite.php`
- `node scripts/suite_operational_closure.js --version=5.1.96`
- `node scripts/preflight_wp_site_suite_release.js --version=5.1.96`

## Pacchetti
- `dist/skinharmony-site-suite-5.1.96.zip`
- `reports/wordpress/releases/skinharmony-site-suite-5.1.96-single-core-authority-template-constraints.zip`

## SHA256
- `ce335b8be2d66e7dfd65b0b376a62abef25529b8877f4bbad45f307356a25477`
